text:
@axelrod777 I like using a fast tempo because a) it tends to lag less when recording, b) I have more room available for placing blank notes if I want them, and c) yes, there are some bars where I couldn't fit the planes + boats + heart, let alone the cars.

More genuine dickspeed (when you get up to like 3000+ tempo) is something I've tried a couple times and given up on because it's too much trouble to keep track of where the beats are when the notes are that far apart. It's no fun.
author: @MediaMunkee

text: Did you really need to use dickspeed for this?
author: @axelrod777
